description_long: This object is a compact, futuristic shotgun with a robust, cylindrical black barrel assembly featuring gold decorative patterns. The barrel section appears to house four separate chambers, suggesting a multi-barrel configuration, and is connected to a complex array of metallic and rubber tubing at the rear. The grip is made of a dark, reddish-brown wood or synthetic material, ergonomically shaped for a single hand, and attached to a black metal trigger guard and frame. The rear of the shotgun displays exposed mechanical components, including copper or brass wiring and connectors, giving it a high-tech, industrial appearance. The front of the shotgun reveals four distinct barrel openings, arranged in a square pattern, with no visible ribbing or venting. The overall design is compact and heavy, with a blend of traditional and advanced materials.
description: A compact, multi-barrel shotgun with a black, gold-embellished cylindrical barrel, exposed wiring, and a dark ergonomic grip. The design blends industrial and futuristic elements.
description_view_0: Side view showing the black cylindrical barrel with gold patterns, ergonomic dark grip, and visible tubing and wiring at the rear.
description_view_1: Rear view highlighting the exposed copper/brass wiring, mechanical connectors, and the back of the grip.
description_view_2: Opposite side view, similar to view 0, with clear visibility of the tubing and the grip's curvature.
description_view_3: Front view displaying four distinct barrel openings in a square configuration, with the grip and trigger guard partially visible below.
attribute_barrel_configuration: Four-barrel configuration, barrels arranged in a square pattern, no visible ribbing or venting.
attribute_trigger_guard_design: Rounded, medium-sized trigger guard with a smooth contour and no visible finger grooves or reinforcement.
